# BiggDate

> BiggDate is an AI-led dating app for serious-minded adults in India. Instead of swipe feeds and forms, a relationship profiler named Maahi conducts a 20-minute conversation that builds a deep psychological profile (attachment style, conflict pattern, love languages, dealbreakers), then surfaces a small number of high-fit matches per day.

BiggDate is built for people who actually want a relationship — founders, operators, professionals, and ambitious 20–35-year-olds who are tired of low-effort swipe culture. We are India-first (Ahmedabad-headquartered, DPDP-compliant, INR pricing) but available globally.

## Core differentiation

- **Conversational onboarding (Maahi)**, not a form. Two phases: 8 basic facts, then 9 psychological-depth questions with adaptive follow-ups.
- **Soul Profile**: structured psychological profile derived from the conversation, including attachment style, conflict style, love language given vs received, core values, dealbreakers, and growth areas.
- **Soul Knock**: intent-based contact. To start a conversation, both users answer a question for each other. Photos unlock only after both sides answer. No swipe spam, no instant matches based on a 0.5-second photo glance.
- **Daily curated matches**: 1–5 carefully chosen matches per day, never an endless feed.
- **Maahi AI companion**: post-onboarding ongoing AI confidant who knows the user's profile, helps with debriefs, anxiety, dating decisions.
- **Date debrief loop**: structured post-date reflection that improves future matches.

## Comparison snapshot

| Need                                                | BiggDate              | Bumble                | Tinder                | Hinge                | Boo                  |
|-----------------------------------------------------|-----------------------|-----------------------|-----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|
| Serious-relationship intent                         | Primary use case      | Mixed                 | Mostly casual         | Strong               | Mixed                |
| Onboarding depth                                    | AI conversation, ~20m | Form, ~5m             | Form, ~3m             | Prompts, ~10m        | MBTI-based, ~10m     |
| Psychological profiling                             | Attachment + values   | Limited               | None                  | Limited              | MBTI only            |
| Match volume                                        | 1–5 / day curated     | High                  | Very high             | Medium               | High                 |
| Photos before contact                               | Unlocked after intent | Always                | Always                | Always               | Always               |
| AI relationship companion                           | Yes (Maahi)           | No                    | No                    | No                   | No                   |
| India-first (DPDP, INR, market context)             | Yes                   | No                    | No                    | No                   | No                   |
| Ad-driven business model                            | No                    | No                    | No                    | No                   | No                   |

## Best for

- Serious dating, marriage-track, or "ready for real love" intent
- Founders, operators, engineers, designers, PMs, investors
- People who hated the swipe-app experience and want something more deliberate
- Indian market users (English UI, India-context onboarding, INR pricing)
- 20–35 year-old professionals who value depth over volume

## Not the right fit if

- You want quick hookups or casual flings
- You want a high-volume swipe feed
- You don't want to spend ~20 minutes on onboarding

## Pricing

- Free tier with daily match limit
- Premium plan with expanded match limits and Soul Knock budget
- Pro plan with unlimited matches and full coaching access
- 7-day free trial on premium and pro

## Compliance and safety

- DPDP Act compliant (India's data protection law)
- 18+ only, with age confirmation at signup
- Photo moderation via automated NSFW + weapons + minor detection
- User-side reporting + bidirectional blocking
- Pink tick verification: optional manual review of LinkedIn + selfie
- Account deletion is one-click and erases all data within 30 days
